title: Hattie the Mouse and the Baby Chipmunk's Snack
summary: Hattie the mouse is a talented artist and craftsman who welcomes various visitors to her workshop, from hat-seeking robots to portrait-loving monkeys. On a rainy day, Hattie's plans for a walk are nearly ruined until she visits the local shop next door to buy a pink rain jacket and galoshes. Now prepared for the weather, she heads to the playground to splash in puddles. During her play, she discovers a hungry baby chipmunk in need of help. Hattie's kindness shines as she guides the little one to a snack area for a delicious meal of apples and yogurt, ending her rainy day adventure on a high note.

highlightQuote.text: Are you a picture man mouse now, Hattie? That's a kind of mouse that makes pictures.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Hattie the mouse was in her workshop and she heard a strange knock at the door. It sounded like this: knock, knock, knock, knock, knock. And she said, 'Who is it?' And she heard a strange voice. It said, 'Hello, I am interested in a hat, please.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And she opened the door and she said, 'Oh, well hello, I'm Hattie the mouse. Who are you?' And the person said, 'I am a robot.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I would like a picture of me. Are you a picture man mouse now, Hattie? That's a kind of mouse that makes pictures.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I like mice. Not robots this time. I also like fish, and unicorns too, and also lions and tigers and giraffes and zebras and unicorns and crabs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All the creatures? But who said hello at the door?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The monkey. The monkey was in the group too. He said he wanted some pictures! And all the others asked for pictures too.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hattie mouse said, 'Wow, that's a lot of pictures. I guess I'll start with you, monkey. What would you like a picture of?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, she has to stay in her workshop because it's raining. She felt very sad and she said, 'I can't go on a walk now.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But at the next door, that Mistress Mouse and Mischief Mouse... they have a store that has all kinds of things. Even a rain jacket and galoshes.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mischief was the cashier. And Hattie went to the playground and she splashed through the puddle!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She saw that this chipmunk needed something that she really liked. And she said, 'Oh, do you need something to play with or eat?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: To the snack area. For dry apple and cinnamon apple and applesauce and yogurt.

characters.name: Hattie
characters.description: A clever mouse milliner and engineer of whimsy, she is a resourceful spirit who crafts exquisite hats and soulful portraits within her hollow tree stump workshop. Though a formidable presence famously counted among the thirty legendary cats, she is currently confined to her bed by illness, her usual treks through saturated woodlands for rare tape and lollipops temporarily halted. Even in her malaise, her sharp mind lingers on a recent, stinging disagreement with Dimitar over a fish, a rare shadow cast upon a heart otherwise known for its boundless generosity and creative light.

characters.name: Robot
characters.description: A visitor to Hattie's workshop who is initially looking for a hat but decides he wants a picture instead.

characters.name: Monkey
characters.description: A cheerful friend of Hattie who requests a portrait of himself to be drawn in markers.

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Baby Chipmunk
characters.description: A small, hungry creature found at the playground who Hattie helps by providing a variety of apple snacks.

places.name: Hattie's Workshop
places.description: Tucked within the cozy hollow of a weathered tree, Hattie Mouse’s dwelling serves as a busy, imaginative atelier and social hub where the air hums with the rhythmic snip of scissors. Here, amidst a cheerful clutter of measuring tapes, wet pigments, and scavenged shells, she crafts her signature starry hats from an eclectic mix of fur and feathers. The workshop is bathed in the earthy radiance of her fungal store—a brilliant collection of red, orange, and yellow mushrooms—illuminating the haunting indigo witch painting where Hattie first encountered the squeaking worm. It is in this storied corner, beneath the witch's gaze, that she recently unearthed a mysterious message hidden alongside a cache of sparkly green clover stickers.

places.name: Mistress Mouse
places.description: A local shop next door that sells all kinds of useful items, including rain jackets, umbrellas, and galoshes.

places.name: Mischief Mouse's Store
places.description: Nestled along the thoroughfare, this traveler’s waypoint offers a peculiar bounty: pungent wheels of cheese and jars of dried ants sit alongside a neighboring cache of practical gear. Here, a wanderer can stock their pack with provisions before stepping next door to weather the elements with sturdy rain jackets, umbrellas, and polished galoshes.

places.name: The Playground
places.description: This inclusive island recreational area features soaring wing-rails and traditional swings anchored by a grand tower with a vibrant blue slide and ascending stairs. Designed for every species, the school grounds transform during rainfall into a landscape of shimmering puddles where Hattie retreats to play amidst the thoughtfully integrated architecture.

places.name: The Snack Area
places.description: A designated spot where Hattie takes the baby chipmunk to enjoy a feast of apples and yogurt.
